key_finding: MAGNITUDE IMMUNITY IS DOSE-SPECIFIC, NOT ABSOLUTE. K-mag gradual: 96->94->80->72% over sigma=1-5 (analog). V-mag gradual: 100->98->89->65% over sigma=1-10. V more robust than K at ALL doses (gap widens 3.7pp->16.7pp). SURPRISE: KV-combined is SUPERADDITIVE — at sigma=2, K=94% V=98% but KV=43% (7.9x worse than independent). Text preserved at ALL doses (98.5% even at KV sigma=5 with 3.7% accuracy).
evidence_impact: Partially vindicates skeptic: immunities are dose-specific. But the K-V SEPARATION is confirmed at all doses — V always more robust than K. Superadditive KV interaction is new mechanistic finding: simultaneous routing+throughput failure. Gradual Llama degradation (vs Qwen cliff) is clearest evidence for analog vs digital encoding. V-mag immunity revised from 'absolute' to 'moderate perturbation only' (129/129 at sigma<=1, but 65% at sigma=10).
next_planned: Priority: (1) Qwen V-mag extreme dose-response (sigma=2-10) to test if V gradual degradation is cross-model. (2) Superadditivity test on Qwen (KV sigma=0.3 below K's cliff). (3) Third model family replication. (4) K-only PGD. (5) Mechanism of superadditivity (attention pattern analysis).

null_space_existence.status: strong (Qwen PGD-validated). Mechanism: likely K-direction space

positional_dissociation.status: STRONG: universal across models. Late positions carry answer info via K-routing

geometric_dissociation.status: K-V direction dissociation CROSS-MODEL REPLICATED. Magnitude immunity REVISED: dose-specific, V>K at all doses

natural_usage.status: H2O/TC protection via position. R-KV shows removing redundant tokens IMPROVES reasoning

cross_model_replication.status: K-V direction on 2 families. Dose-response on Llama (gradual=analog). Need Qwen dose-response + 3rd family

encoding_strategy.status: Digital (Qwen: K-mag cliff at sigma 0.5-1) vs distributed (Llama: K-mag gradual over sigma 1-5). V-mag gradual on both. KV superadditive on Llama

superadditive_interaction.status: NEW: KV-combined 7.9x-16.8x worse than independent at sigma 2-5. Cascading routing+throughput failure

literature_convergence.status: 5+ independent groups converge. K-V dissociation is novel contribution beyond existing literature
